moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships begin on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Centre Court awaits! Wimbledon 2026 starts Monday – who are you backing to lift the trophy this year?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are ready! The greatest tennis tournament is back from Monday. Can a Brit go all the way at Wimbledon 2026?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: The buzz is building in SW19! Wimbledon kicks off Monday. Who's heading to the queues or watching from home?

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Qualifying
moments.blurb: Final qualifying events for The 154th Open Championship, set for Royal Birkdale in July, will be played on June 30 at four locations across the UK.

angles.name: Pathway to Glory
angles.copy: Who will make it to Royal Birkdale? Final qualifying for The Open Championship is on Tuesday. Dream big, golfers!

angles.name: Golf Excitement
angles.copy: The road to the Claret Jug is heating up! Final qualifying for The Open is this Tuesday. Any local heroes trying to get through?

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, which premiered on June 1, airs new episodes nightly (except Saturdays) at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, with the latest drama unfolding in the villa.

angles.name: Daily Drama
angles.copy: Got a text! What's the latest in the Love Island villa? Tune in tonight at 9pm for all the drama and recoupling chaos.

angles.name: Fan Reactions
angles.copy: The Love Island memes are flowing! What's been your favourite moment from the villa this week? Catch up tonight on ITV2 and ITVX.

moments.title: Wireless Festival 2026 Approaches
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival is set to take over Finsbury Park, London, from July 10-12, featuring Ye (Kanye West) as a headliner for all three days.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: London's about to get loud! Wireless Festival is just weeks away, July 10-12. Who are you buzzing to see on stage?

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: Ye is headlining all three days of Wireless Festival! Get ready for a huge weekend of music in Finsbury Park, July 10-12.

moments.title: UK Summer Weather Outlook
moments.blurb: The UK is heading into a summer predicted to be warmer and slightly drier than average, with July potentially bringing above-average temperatures and a risk of heavy showers.

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Forecast says warmer than average summer ahead! Time to dust off the BBQ. What are your summer plans?

angles.name: Mixed Forecast
angles.copy: Warm, dry, but with a chance of thundery showers in July? Sounds like a classic British summer! Are you ready?
